name: vRPayment
description: The official VR Payment plugin for plentymarkets.

shortDescription.de: Ein Plugin - 50+ PSPs. Mit dem VR Payment Plugin verbinden Sie direkt zu Ihrem gewünschten PSP und akzeptieren Kreditkarten, Rechnungen, SOFORT, Alipay, usw.
shortDescription.en: Connect to over 50+ Payment Service Provider. Process credit cards, Sofort, Paydirekt, PayPal, Alipay, and many more.

author: VR Payment GmbH

dataProviders.name: VR Payment Payment Information
dataProviders.description: Display information about the VR Payment payment on the checkout page.

dataProviders.name: VR Payment Redirect Handler
dataProviders.description: Handles automatic redirect to VR Payment page for PWA checkout.
